hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'git push' && printf '{"systemMessage":"Pre-push reminder: (1) run /cavemem if session state has changed, (2) confirm no new ADR is needed for recent decisions, (3) check bug backlog in memory is current."}' || printf '{}'
jq -e '.tool_input.status == "completed"' > /dev/null 2>&1 && printf '{"systemMessage":"Task marked complete — run /cavemem to persist migration state to memory"}' || printf '{}'
